cobblemon.species.magneton-iono.desc: This custom Magneton form was discovered orbiting around Iono’s head during livestreams. Its bodies emit a soft pastel glow and sync with the rhythm of her voice. Viewers report feeling strangely energized after watching, as if the Pokémon transmits positive static through the screen.
cobblemon.species.rowlet-duo.desc: Unlike any other pokemons, this particular rowlet, strangely, speaks Paldean.
cobblemon.species.glaceon-summer.desc: This Glaceon is often seen patrolling coastal piers and misty harbors. Despite the summer heat, it keeps its body temperature low, creating a refreshing breeze that trails behind it like sea spray
cobblemon.species.ogerpon-aniversary.des: To commemorate the MissingMon add-on reaching one million downloads, Ogerpon dons a radiant festive robe woven with shimmering thread and adorned with elegant patterns. Overflowing with joy and gratitude, she performs lively dances that scatter glowing petals through the air. It’s said that those who witness her celebration will be blessed with good fortune
cobblemon.species.pikachu-world.desc: This Pikachu proudly wears the 2025 World Championships jersey. Trainers say its sparks shine brighter than ever when the roar of the crowd fills the stadium.
cobblemon.species.hooh-art.desc: New Dex entry coming soon… probably
cobblemon.species.dragonite-mail.desc: It flies great distances to deliver letters from one heart to another. Some say its wings never tire, no matter how far it travels
cobblemon.species.rowlet-ash.desc: This Rowlet is sleepy all the time, but when it takes action, it always performs with remarkable skill, even surpassing its evolved form.
cobblemon.species.gengar-ot.desc: I'd rather die than go to work tomorrow! Oh wait...
